module.name: protocol
module.purpose: Owns the marix-protocol crate definitions and namespace exports for reusable session, task, plan, answer, step, execution, tool, and shared signature protocol contracts. ExecutionSignature now supports ordering and hashing for runtime execution-to-step maps.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns task protocol contracts including task identifiers, events, request previews, signature-free TaskPreview request/result snapshots, TaskSignature values that implement Signature via their TaskId UUID, results, and statuses.

childModules.name: plan
childModules.purpose: Owns Answer parsing, Plan parsing, run_steps/pending_steps planning fields, and PlanSignature identity contracts for extracted model task outputs.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns step protocol contracts including executable drafts, unit Intent step kinds whose descriptions live on StepDraft, StepSignature values, events, results, statuses, and previews; planning output moved to the plan module.

childModules.name: execution
childModules.purpose: Owns execution protocol contracts including map-friendly ExecutionSignature values, execution ids, events, requests, updates, and statuses.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Owns tool schema and preview protocol contracts.

childModules.name: external
childModules.purpose: Local third-party re-export wiring for protocol internals.
